neural_core.description: Enhanced TESSERANet with GRU-style field gating, deeper encoder/decoder, multi-scale prediction heads, LayerNorm, configurable depth/width
key_improvements: GRU-style field update with update/reset gates for richer temporal dynamics
Deep encoder/decoder with LayerNorm and GELU activations (configurable depth)
Multi-scale prediction heads (instant + short-horizon) with weighted fusion
Layer normalization on field state for training stability
AdamW optimizer with weight decay for better generalization
Persistence-safe initialization (predictor heads start at zero)

plugin_runtime.description: Enhanced TesseraPlugin with stateful memory buffer, multi-scale anomaly scoring, wound tracking, configurable field/code dimensions
key_improvements: Stateful latent memory buffer with configurable capacity
Multi-scale anomaly scoring (instant + short + medium horizon)
Wound history tracking across inference cycles
Anomaly history for temporal pattern detection
Checkpoint v0.2 with memory_count, wound_count, anomaly_mean

governance.description: Fixed loop compiler API, added 14 new tests, all 52 tests pass
key_improvements: Added 14 new EVO-12 tests covering neural core, plugin runtime, integration
Test suite expanded from 38 to 52 tests (36.8% increase)

non_claim_lock: EVO-012 enhances the neural architecture and plugin runtime but does not claim general transfer, production readiness, or autonomous authority. The synthetic AUC of 0.828 is consistent with previous evolutions and remains a diagnostic benchmark.
next_operations: Evaluate enhanced network on NAB real telemetry transfer
Run multi-seed benchmark with depth=3, hidden_dim=128 configuration
Build agent trajectory adapter for offline benchmark (Phase 4)
